channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Haaland gets record £15.5m price in Fantasy Premier League, other major changes
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Fantasy Premier League unveils major changes for 2026/27, including Erling Haaland’s record £15.5m price tag and real-time mini-league updates. Stay ahead!
Read More: https://punchng.com/haaland-gets-record-15-5m-price-in-fantasy-premier-league-other-major-changes/

item.title: EPL: Arsenal confirm extended injury layoff for Saliba
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Arsenal confirms William Saliba will miss an extended period due to a back injury sustained at the World Cup. Learn more about Saliba’s injury and recovery
Read More: https://punchng.com/epl-arsenal-confirm-extended-injury-layoff-for-saliba/

item.title: Ignore fake recruitment update, Customs tell Nigerians
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Nigeria Customs Service urges Nigerians to disregard a fake recruitment update circulating online. Rely only on official NCS channels for authentic Cus
Read More: https://punchng.com/ignore-fake-recruitment-update-customs-tell-nigerians/

item.title: Customs plan 100% cargo scanning at Onne Port
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigeria Customs Service announces 100% cargo scanning at Onne Port to tighten surveillance and track dangerous goods, including arms and drugs.
Read More: https://punchng.com/customs-plan-100-cargo-scanning-at-onne-port/

item.title: Court to rule on NDLEA bid to destroy ₦480bn meth lab Friday
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Federal High Court will rule on NDLEA’s application to destroy a ₦480bn clandestine meth lab in Ogun State. Learn more about the case and the agency’s
Read More: https://punchng.com/court-to-rule-on-ndlea-bid-to-destroy-%e2%82%a6480bn-meth-lab-friday/

item.title: Navy hands over rescued human trafficking victims to NAPTIP
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Nigerian Navy rescued and handed over two human trafficking victims to NAPTIP, reaffirming its commitment to combating this transnational crime in Nige
Read More: https://punchng.com/navy-hands-over-rescued-human-trafficking-victims-to-naptip/

item.title: I’m closely following Gbenga Daniel’s footsteps, says Ogun gov
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Ogun State Governor Dapo Abiodun expresses high esteem for former governor Gbenga Daniel, stating he is closely following his footsteps despite past politi
Read More: https://punchng.com/im-closely-following-gbenga-daniels-footsteps-says-ogun-gov/

item.title: Gavi: Why Paredes Should Not Be Suspended
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Spain midfielder Gavi has disclosed that Argentina’s Leandro Paredes should not face a suspension, dismissing the post-match brawl at the final of the FIFA World Cup 2026 as a normal part of the game’s physical side. In an interview with El Partidazo de COPE, Gavi noted that he doesn&#82

item.title: Three young Nigerians launch ChatPay waitlist, target banking friction on WhatsApp
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Three young Nigerian entrepreneurs have opened the public waitlist for ChatPay, a conversational banking platform they say is designed to simplify financial transactions by enabling users to send money, pay bills and buy airtime directly within WhatsApp.

item.title: Why smart borrowers are building wealth while others stay trapped in debt – Onosode
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay Tech
item.description: Smart borrowers are increasingly using credit as a tool to build wealth and grow businesses, while others remain trapped in

item.title: I’m healthier, younger than Kwankwaso – Hanga accuses NDC VP candidate of political victimisation
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Senator Rufai Sani Hanga, a former political ally of Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso and the Kwankwasiyya movement, has attacked Kwankwaso, expressing dismay over what he described as flimsy reasons for denying him the opportunity to contest for any political office. Hanga, who spoke during a radio programme i

item.title: NIMC courts BOI, Women Affairs Ministry to turn digital ID into economic infrastructure
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay Tech
item.description: Nigeria’s identity agency is accelerating efforts to reposition the national digital identity system as a foundation for financial inclusion, social

item.title: Nigerian equities slump 0.50% driven by maximum losses in Nestlé, BUA Foods
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: The Nigerian equities market snapped its two-day rally on Wednesday, July 22, 2026, with the NGX All-Share Index (ASI) declining 0.50% to close at 245,418.37 points, down from 246,659.56 points at Tuesday's close. The post Nigerian equities slump 0.50% driven by maximum losses in Nestlé, BUA Foods a

item.title: Editorial: Commendable progress, but the fight must continue
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The United States deserves commendation for continuing to support Nigeria's security efforts. Assistance in intelligence gathering, surveillance, military training, technology and logistics has strengthened the capabilities of Nigerian security agencies.

item.title: Moniepoint’s $700m lending push barely dented Nigeria’s $32bn SME credit gap
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay Tech
item.description: Moniepoint disbursed more than $700 million in loans to Nigerian Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) over the past year,

item.title: Hamzat: My Plan is to Make Lagos Human Capital of the World
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Deputy Governor of Lagos State and candidate of the All Progressives Congress for the 2027 gubernatorial election in the Centre of Excellence, Dr Kadri Obafemi Hamzat, in this interview reflects

item.title: As Senate Confirms Fasina as Ambassador Amid Tension and Public Outcry…
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: A routine ambassadorial confirmation turned into a dramatic Senate showdown recently as lawmakers fiercely debated constitutional rights, pending court cases and public perception before ultimately approving Professor Abayomi Fasina’s nomination.

item.description: The 2026 Lugbe Deanery Catholic Men Organisation (LDCMO) Football Tournament will reach its climax on Sunday, 26 July, with St. Linus, Chika/Aleita, taking on SS. Peter & Paul, New Site, in a highly anticipated final at the Super Tech FC Arena, Abuja. The showpiece encounter, scheduled to kick o

item.title: FRSC begins special intervention to reduce fatalities on Abia roads, targets offenders

item.description: The Federal Road Safety Corps, FRSC,  Abia State Sector Command, has commenced a special intervention patrol codenamed “Operation KWUSI IHE MBEREDE OKPOROUZO, as directed by its  zonal Command Headquarters in Enugu. The operation, according to the FRSC, is part of  strategic eff

item.description: Watch highlights of the pre-season friendly between Tottenham and MK Dons. Credit: SPURSPLAY.

item.title: 2027: NDC, Obidients tackle Ganduje over Obi, Kwankwaso ticket

item.description:
NDC and Obidient Movement dismiss Ganduje’s claim that the Obi-Kwankwaso ticket lacks the political legacy to win the 2027 election, citing strong records.

item.description:
APC candidate Bola Oyebamiji assures Osun residents that voter intimidation will not be tolerated in the 2026 election. He urges participation without fear

item.description:

item.title: 2027: Group Urges APC To Appoint Northern Christian As Tinubu’s Campaign DG
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: As the 2027 electioneering campaign draws closer, a Northern Christian Progressive Group has called on the APC to appoint a Northern Christian as Director-General of the presidential campaign to ensure the overwhelming success of President Bola Tinubu’s re-election bid. The Group Secretary, Rev. Hay

item.title: US Court Jails Man 75 Years Over Child Sexual Exploitation
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: A federal court in the United States has sentenced a 35-year-old Jefferson County man, Quinnton Dawson, to 75 years in prison after convicting him on multiple child sexual exploitation and child pornography-related offences. The sentence was made known in a statement published on Wednesday via the w

item.title: Terrorists ambush, shoot youth leader after granting interview condemning Plateau attacks
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: President of the Dorowa Babuje Youth Council in Barkin Ladi Local Government Area of Plateau State, Pam Fom, was on Wednesday, July 22nd, 2026, reportedly ambushed and shot by suspected Fulani militias a day after he granted an interview condemning an attack on the community by terrorists on Tu

item.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The company said earlier this year it expected to spend as much as $190bn on AI investments.

item.title: Troops Repel Terrorist Attack In Adamawa As Police Recover Stolen Vehicle
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: A combined security team comprising troops of the 144 Battalion of the Nigerian Army, operatives of the Adamawa State Police Command, and members of the Civilian Joint Task Force (CJTF) has repelled a terrorist attack on Garaha Village in Hong Local Government Area. The joint team reportedly respond

item.title: Eagles Striker Arokodare Denies Reports of Unprofessional Conduct
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Super Eagles striker Tolu Arokodare has responded to reports surrounding his situation at Wolverhampton Wanderers, describing many of the claims circulating in the media as inaccurate. The Nigerian forward, in a post on his X page on Wednesday, said he was “very surprised and disappointed&#822

item.title: Media executives urged to amplify PWDs voices during elections

item.description: Ahead of the August 15 governorship election in Osun State, media executives and other stakeholders have been urged to create platforms that amplify the voices of Persons with Disabilities, PWDs, on political participation and increase media content focusing on their rights and electoral p

item.title: Arsenal defender Saliba sidelined for ‘extended period’ due to back injury
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Centre back William Saliba won't require surgery for injury sustained at World Cup, his club says.

item.title: Bauchi To Shut Down Unregistered Private Schools, Says Education Commissioner
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Bauchi State Government has reiterated its resolve to close down all unregistered private schools operating across the state as part of efforts to improve the quality of education system twenty local government area councils. The Commissioner for Education, Abdulkadir Ibrahim, stated this during

item.title: Messi-less Miami beat Fire 3-2 to spoil Lewandowski’s MLS debut

item.description: Uruguayan veteran Suarez captained Miami with Messi and fellow Argentine Rodrigo de Paul missing four days after Argentina lost 1-0 to Spain in the World Cup final. The post Messi-less Miami beat Fire 3-2 to spoil Lewandowski’s MLS debut appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: I’m president at home – Fashola on contesting for Nigerian Presidency
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former governor of Lagos State, Babatunde Fashola, has dismissed any form of insinuation that he might contest for the Presidency of Nigeria. Fashola disclosed that he’s the president of his home and can’t run for the highest political office in Nigeria. The All Progressives Congress, AP

item.title: How I became illegal immigrant in South Africa — Returnee
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: According to him, he entered South Africa legally but later struggled to maintain his immigration status after abandoning his studies due to financial difficulties. The post How I became illegal immigrant in South Africa — Returnee appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Top stories from across Nigerian Newspapers, Thursday July 23

item.description: Here are the top stories from across the country today. 1. item.title: Miami Heat admit LeBron 'introductory' video posted by mistake
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Miami Heat have confirmed a video teasing LeBron James' potential return to the NBA franchise was posted by mistake.

item.title: Navy hands rescued trafficking victims to NAPTIP
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: "The handover, conducted by Forward Operating Base (FOB) BADAGRY on 19 July 2026 at the Agency's Lagos Zonal Command in Ikeja, followed the victims' rescue during a targeted anti-human trafficking operation on 17 July 2026."

item.dc:creator: Tribune

item.title: Seven Ibom Air engineers achieve professional upgrade
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: IBOM Air has celebrated a milestone in its technical operations, with the professional advancement of seven of its licenced aircraft engineers, reaffirming the airline’s commitment to developing indigenous aviation talent and strengthening its maintenance capabilities. item.title: Abdulmalik Zannah: Appreciating The Legislative Agenda Of An Uncommon Representative
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Leadership is a sacred trust. It is deeply associated with divinity. Leadership is not a factor of propaganda, sloganeering, or mere noise-making and superficial popularity. A person may be popular and yet not qualify as a true leader. In Zamfara State, we measure our leaders not by the number of la

item.title: Stock Market Slips By 0.5%, Market Value Drops N800bn
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Nigerian equities market reversed part of its recent gains on Wednesday as the benchmark index declined by 0.5 per cent, wiping N800 billion off investors’ wealth amid profit-taking in blue-chip stocks. The All-Share Index (ASI) fell by 1,241.19 points, or 0.50 per cent, to close at 245,41

item.title: Kwara United Unveil 16 New Signings Ahead of 2026/27 NPFL Season
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Kwara United have unveiled 16 new players ahead of the 2026/27 Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) season as the club intensifies preparations for a title challenge. Speaking to journalists at the club’s secretariat in Ilorin on Wednesday, Chairman Kumbi Titiloye said the new arrivals were carefu

item.title: Iyaw youths laud Tinubu, Ribadu over PAP scholarship, urge Otuaro to ignore detractors
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Ijaw Youth Network (IYN) has commended President Bola Tinubu and the National Security Adviser, Mallam Nuhu Ribadu, for the unprecedented scholarships of the Presidential Amnesty Programme under Dr Dennis Brutu Otuaro. The post Iyaw youths laud Tinubu, Ribadu over PAP scholarship, urge Otuaro to

item.title: Navy uncovers 9 illegal refineries, recovers 104,000 litres of stolen crude
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Nigerian Navy has uncovered nine illegal refining sites and recovered about 104,000 litres of products suspected to be stolen crude oil during an operation in Bonny Local Government Area of Rivers State. The operation was carried out by personnel of the Forward Operating Base, FOB, Bonny under O

item.title: Appreciating The New Wave Of Synergy Under CDS Oluyede
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Nigerian Armed Forces are currently at their climax, doing what they know best and asserting dominance across all spheres of engagement with the enemies of the State. Operational successes across the country reveal that our armed forces are ahead of our adversaries. They are, on a daily basis, b

item.title: Troops rescue 11 kidnap victims, arrest 21 suspects
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Troops have rescued 11 kidnapped victims and arrested 21 suspected terrorists, collaborators, logistics suppliers and drug peddlers in coordinated operations across Borno, Zamfara and Kogi. The post Troops rescue 11 kidnap victims, arrest 21 suspects appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Liberia, Nigeria Deepen Economic Ties, Target Stronger Trade, Investment
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria and Liberia have reaffirmed their commitment to strengthening bilateral trade and investment, with both countries calling for deeper regional economic integration, stronger private-sector collaboration, and investment-led growth to drive Africa’s development. The commitment was made at

item.title: Russia says warned Rubio against delivering arms to Ukraine
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov "stressed that it was unacceptable to continue supplying weapons to the Kyiv regime" in a meeting with his US counterpart Marco Rubio in Manila, it said. The post Russia says warned Rubio against delivering arms to Ukraine appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: France Commits €3.3bn To Nigeria’s Water, Power, Transport Projects
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: France has reaffirmed its commitment to Nigeria’s sustainable development, with the French Development Agency (AFD) investing more than €3.3 billion in 57 projects spanning 23 states, targeting critical sectors such as water, power, transport, climate resilience and skills development. The inv

item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “We are confident of clearing all the state Assembly seats. We are also confident of winning the senatorial, House of Representatives and governorship elections as well,” he said.

item.title: Zenith Named Africa, Nigeria’s Best Bank At 2026 Euromoney Awards
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Zenith Bank Plc has won two top honours at the Euromoney Awards for Excellence 2026, taking both “Africa’s Best Bank” and “Nigeria’s Best Bank.” The bank said the awards were presented on 16 July at The Peninsula London Hotel. Euromoney’s annual awards assess banks on strategy, profitability, risk m

item.title: ‘You’re exact opposite of World Cup’ – US lawmaker slams Trump for refusing to leave stage
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: US Congresswoman, Yassamin Ansari, has said that President Donald Trump was an unwelcome figure during the 2026 World Cup presentation ceremony, as he lingered on stage while Spain celebrated their victory. La Roja triumphed over the 10-man defending champions Argentina with a score of 1-0 in extra

Udengs Eradiri, has dismissed criticism of his positive assessment of the Minister of the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), Nyesom Wike, insisting that the minister's performance speaks for itself and has exposed the shortcomings of

item.title: Dollar to Naira exchange rate today, July 23, 2026
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The naira traded within a relatively stable range against the United States dollar on Thursday, July 23, 2026, across both the official Nigerian Foreign Exchange Market (NFEM) and the parallel market. The post Dollar to Naira exchange rate today, July 23, 2026 appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Transcorp Hotels Plc has recorded a 12 per cent increase in profit before tax (PBT) to N13.7 billion for the second quarter (Q2) ended June 30, 2026, reflecting strong cost management and operational efficiency despite softer revenue during the period. The unaudited financial results released on the

The bank said

item.title: Arsenal out, Aston Villa in: Can football still rebrand Rwanda?
item.dc:creator: The Africa Report
item.description: Kigali’s $27m (£20m) front-of-shirt deal with Aston Villa keeps its Premier League strategy alive. But as the spotlight on Rwanda’s meddling in Democratic Republic of Congo shines brighter, its effort to separate football from politics becomes increasingly difficult.

item.title: Transfer: Ex-Portugal boss, Santos hails Real Madrid over recent signing
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former Portugal head coach, Fernando Santos, has praised the recent signing of Bernardo Silva by Real Madrid. Silva joined the Spanish giants last month on a free transfer after a successful tenure at Manchester City. Silva, now 31, makes his way to the Santiago Bernabeu following a nine-season peri

The initiative, organised in partn

item.title: Nigeria’s money supply jumps to N133.25 trillion despite 26.5% interest rate
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: Nigeria’s broad money supply rose to N133.25 trillion in June 2026 from N129.21 trillion in May, even as the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) maintained its benchmark interest rate at 26.5%. The post Nigeria’s money supply jumps to N133.25 trillion despite 26.5% interest rate appeared first on Nairamet

item.title: No presidency for me, Fashola declares
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “My journey has been an unimaginable privilege, and I hope that it, in some way, inspires another generation about the possibilities of this country,” he said.

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: THE Senate has called for a new law seeking tighter regulation and penalties for mining activities in the country as it received the news of the death of 20 workers during a landslide in Alufele in Enjema District The post Illegal mining: Senate proposes bill on tighter regulatuions, penalties appea

item.title: Ebola deaths surpass 1,000 as Africa races to contain fastest-growing outbreak
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: The death toll from the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) has surpassed 1,000, intensifying efforts by African and global health authorities to contain what has become the fastest-growing Ebola epidemic on record. item.dc:creator: BusinessDay

item.title: Dangote Refinery hikes petrol price to N1,215/litre, resumes gantry loading in Naira
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: DANGOTE Petroleum Refinery has increased its ex-depot petrol price to N1,215 per litre from previous N1,075 per litre, representing 13.02 per cent increase, Nigerian Tribune has gathered. The post Dangote Refinery hikes petrol price to N1,215/litre, resumes gantry loading in Naira appeared first on

item.title: 2027: Dickson vows NDC will survive ‘anti-democratic forces’
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “Nigeria’s democracy must survive. Multi-party democracy must survive no matter the different odds we may face in the course of returning Nigeria to the right course,” he said.

item.title: Africa: Germany's Growing Interest in Africa - A Win for Both Sides?
item.dc:creator: AllAfrica
item.description: [DW] Germany is deepening its footprint across Africa, as Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul embarks on his third trip to the continent in 2026. His top-level talks will focus on security, skills development and investment.

item.title: 2027: Fashola rules out contesting for presidency
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Former Lagos State Governor and ex-Minister of Works, Babatunde Fashola, has dismissed speculation about a possible 2027 presidential bid, declaring that he has no intention of seeking Nigeria's highest political office. The post 2027: Fashola rules out contesting for presidency appeared first on Th

item.title: World Cup: ‘Argentina were ordered to lose against Spain’ – Psychologist
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: An Argentine psychologist has claimed that the La Albiceleste team, led by Lionel Messi, was instructed to lose the 2026 World Cup final against Spain. The final, held at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey on Sunday, was a tense and physical match that ended without any goals after 90 minutes.

item.title: ICPC grills alleged PFIPC DG as probe into ‘fictitious’ agency deepens
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: The Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC) interrogated Adeniyi Adeyemi, alleged founder of the disputed Promotion Council

item.title: Congo-Kinshasa: Ebola Deaths Increase to Over 1,000
item.dc:creator: AllAfrica
item.description: [DW] The fatality rate of the latest Ebola virus outbreak since mid-May is far higher than in previous outbreaks. No vaccines or treatments exist for the new strain.

item.title: SAHCO deploys evacuation chair for passengers with reduced mobility
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: SKYWAY Aviation Handling Company (SAHCO) PLC has acquired the Evac+ Chair emergency evacuation chairs specially for passengers with reduced mobility. The post SAHCO deploys evacuation chair for passengers with reduced mobility appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: China Tankers Head to Red Sea Chokepoint Despite Houthi Attacks
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Two China-owned oil tankers loaded with Saudi Arabian crude are sticking to their course toward the Red Sea chokepoint of Bab el Mandeb, despite Houthi militants attacking vessels in the region overnight.

item.title: South African Women Confront EX Beauty Queen Chidimma Adetshina During Court Appearance
item.dc:creator: SDK Celeb
item.description: A viral video shows South African women confronting former Miss Universe Nigeria, Chidimma Adetshina, outside the Cape Town Regional Court, telling her to return to Nigeria and calling her an “identity thief.” The women shouted “Go home, Nigeria is your home” as she walked out of the courtroom,

item.title: Kano launches multi-agency task force to combat drug abuse
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The governor pledged government support, including funding, operational vehicles, office accommodation, logistics and security backing, to enable the task force to discharge its mandate effectively.

item.title: Even Messi Needed Trophies: Nigerians Want Results, Not Dribbles
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: From a general observation, comparisons are powerful political tools. They simplify complex realities, inspire supporters and shape public perception. Another side of this is that they can also become misleading when symbolism replaces substance. The latter appears to be the objective behind two rec

item.title: EasyJet Profit Falls 70% Amid Higher Fuel Bill, Lower Demand
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: EasyJet Plc said profit fell by 70% in its fiscal third quarter as the UK budget carrier continues to suffer from higher jet fuel costs and lower consumer demand, driven by the impact from the Middle East conflict.

item.title: ‘I’m president at home’ – Fashola rules out presidential bid
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “Let history write whatever history wants to write. It is not in my place,” he said.

item.title: World Cup Without Nigeria Is Incomplete —CAF President Motsepe
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Confederation of African Football (CAF) President Patrice Motsepe insists World Cup without Nigeria’s Super Eagles and Indomitable Lions of Cameroon is incomplete. The Super Eagles once again failed to qualify for the World Cup after losing the automatic spot to Motsepe’s South Africa. Despite losin

item.title: Arokodare breaks silence amid Wolves training controversy
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The Nigerian forward released a statement via his social media pages on Wednesday The post Arokodare breaks silence amid Wolves training controversy appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Russia's businesses under strain from Ukraine's attacks on Wildberries
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Ukrainian drones have hit several retail warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer Wildberries in a matter of days.

item.title: South Africa: Parties Split Over Ramaphosa Impeachment Process - South African News Briefs - July 23, 2026
item.dc:creator: AllAfrica
item.description: [allAfrica]

item.title: Trump commends Tinubu’s counter-terrorism leadership in official letter
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: US President Donald Trump has commended Nigerian President Bola Tinubu for his decisive leadership in tackling terrorism and security challenges,

item.title: Engaging US lobbyists against Tinubu is unconscionable, unpatriotic – Shehu Sani
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Former lawmaker Shehu Sani has criticised the presidential candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Atiku Abubakar, over the reported engagement of a United States lobbying firm to circulate documents linked to President Bola Tinubu’s past forfeiture case in the US. The post Engaging US l

item.title: “The winning mentality starts here” – Awoniyi targets strong Nottingham Forest season after pre-season goal
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Awoniyi, who endured a frustrating 2025/26 campaign due to injuries and inconsistent form, delivered another encouraging display as he continued his resurgence ahead of the new season The post “The winning mentality starts here” – Awoniyi targets strong Nottingham Forest season after pre-season goal

item.title: TotalEnergies Profit Jumps 68% as War Upends Energy Markets
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: TotalEnergies SE said second-quarter profit surged as the Iran war boosted prices of crude and refined products, offsetting a drop in profits in its gas business.

item.title: Airtel Mobile-Money Unit Chooses London for Listing Location
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Airtel Africa Plc picked London as the primary listing location for its mobile-money business and expects to start trading there this year.

item.title: ServiceNow bets $40 million on Indian banking software specialist to expand its financial services push
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: ServiceNow's investment gives BusinessNext a strategic partner to expand its AI-powered banking software globally.

item.title: Between hope and fear: Yemenis react to Houthi blockade on Saudi Arabia
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Yemenis fear a maritime embargo on Saudi Arabia could reignite war, deepen shortages and worsen hunger.

item.title: MLS Launches Probe Into Beckham’s Inter Miami For Alleged Tampering Over Casemiro Signing
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Former Manchester United midfielder Casemiro’s move to Inter Miami is under investigation by Major League Soccer over allegations of tampering by Sir David Beckham’s club. Miami announced Casemiro’s signing on Wednesday in a deal to run until the end of next season with the option to extend it until
